name: Cheesy Vegetable Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine the shredded farmer cheese, plain yogurt, lemon juice, and soy sauce.
2. Process until smooth.
3. Add the finely chopped celery, chopped pecans, currants, toasted wheat germ, chopped apple, chopped carrot, and curry powder.
4. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
5. Use as a spread on crackers, whole wheat bread, or pita crisps, or stuff into pita pockets.
6. Makes 1 1/2 cups
Variations: Substitute shredded Cheddar for the farmer cheese. The spread may be made in advance and refrigerated for 3-4 days.
